content.en:
"A super-dimensional rule, although it is not very powerful in the third realm, but most of the third realm cannot raise the extra-dimensional rule to the level of one!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And he has also cultivated into the wisdom body of the Ka Ye, the physical body is extremely powerful, and with a super-dimensional rule, the combat power is naturally extremely terrifying.

With his current strength, even if the Holy Sea Realm Lord was still alive, he would not be his opponent.

However, this strength is far from being invincible in the third realm.

"There are more than a hundred years of the extradimensional era, and we should be able to raise our cultivation to the late stage of the third realm, and strive to break through our cultivation as soon as possible, so that our strength can be improved again!"

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to retreat and practice penance.

At the same time, the Outer Dimensional Realm in the body of the Moon Realm Lord was about to be repaired.

A drop of the three-realm multi-dimensional healing essence, it is impossible to completely recover the injuries of the lord of the Shangyue Realm, but it is only used to repair the extra-dimensional realm in the body, the problem is still not big, but even if it is repaired, it is not a perfect extra-dimensional realm, and there is almost no potential to break through to the fourth realm in the future, unless there is a greater opportunity in the future to allow her to reshape her foundation, she is expected to break through to the fourth realm.

But the potential is not good, and the strength is not good, how can 18 be qualified for such a big opportunity!

this day.

The Extra-Dimensional Realm in the body of the Moon Realm Lord has almost recovered, and the follow-up injuries need to be slowly recuperated, and it may take hundreds or even thousands of extradimensional eras to slowly repair the injuries.

"Moon Realm Lord, the extradimensional realm in your body has recovered, it's time to give me the Duowei Treasure Bottle!"

Ye Tian urged.

"Good!"

The Lord of the Shangyue Realm didn't dare to resist, not to mention that she had made an oath, even if she hadn't made an oath, she knew that she couldn't beat Ye Tian.

Wow!

The Duowei Treasure Vase fell into Ye Tian's hand.

Looking at the multi-dimensional treasure bottle in his hand, Ye Tian smiled, this is the first multi-dimensional treasure bottle in his real sense, the multi-dimensional treasure bottle obtained before is just an imitation, and the value is not even one percent of the real multi-dimensional treasure bottle.

"Moon Realm Lord, you're almost recovering from your injuries, what should you do next?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Shangyue Realm Lord said helplessly: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I am wanted by the Blazing Yang Palace, if it were not for the protection of your third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique, the Blazing Yang Palace would definitely hunt me down." I need you to integrate the sealing power of the Great Realm Armor Technique into this multi-dimensional sealing stone, so that I can rely on the power in this multi-dimensional sealing stone to block the deduction of the fourth realm. Of course, deducing my traces in the fourth realm is also very labor-intensive, and it may not necessarily deduce my existence, but it will be safer. "

As she spoke, she took out a multidimensional sealing stone.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian immediately mobilized the third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique, and did not cast the fourth-layer Great Realm Armor Technique.

Soon, a multi-dimensional sealing stone carrying the power of the Great Realm Armor was ready.

"Lord of the Moon Realm, if this sealing stone is maintained with the lowest consumption, it can maintain tens of thousands of extradimensional eras. However, if you use it often, the power will be consumed too much and it will not last long. When the power of the Seal Stone is about to be exhausted, you come to me again, and I will bless you again!"

Ye Tian said.

The Moon Realm Lord nodded and thanked him, "Thank you Ye Tian Realm Lord." "

Subsequently, the Lord of the Moon Realm left.

Ye Tian didn't ask where the Lord of the Dressing Moon Realm had gone, maybe she had other secrets, but he didn't care.

No matter how big the secret of the Lord of the Moon Realm is, it is not as big as his secret.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to cultivate and make continuous progress.

More than one hundred and fifty extradimensional eras have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation finally ushered in a breakthrough and reached the late stage of the third realm, he was able to break through to the late stage of the third realm faster than expected, and the wisdom body of the Ka Ye played a role.

But even after more than 150 years of penance, his extra-dimensional rule realm was still one extra-dimensional rule, and he had not reached two extra-dimensional rule realms.

"The later the realm of extra-dimensional rules, the more difficult it is to improve, I can often cast multi-dimensional wisdom light, but I can't easily comprehend the second extra-dimensional rule, and the other third realms want to raise the super-dimensional rules to the realm of the second realm, it is even more difficult!"

Ye Tian also knew what his flaw was, that is, there was no treasure that quickly assisted in comprehending the rules of the outer dimension.

The Black Mist Stone Statue in the Black Mist Realm was still of low grade, and it was of little use to him now.

But he didn't come from those big powers, and he didn't have access to that kind of good stuff at the moment.

Even if he was the Lord of the Moon Realm, he didn't know where there was a better treasure land that could help him quickly improve the extradimensional rules.

"After all, it hasn't been too long since the Lord of the Shangyue Realm broke through to the third realm, and I'm afraid my knowledge is still shallow!"

Suddenly.

Ye Tian thought of an existence-the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon is a superdimensional creature at the peak of the third realm, and its origin is very mysterious, and it was suppressed by a fourth realm in the Red Dragon Yuan.

Ye Tian didn't know what the strength of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was, but it should have seen a lot, maybe he could consult it.

......

Six Thousand Territory, Red Dragon Abyss.

Ye Tian came here.

Now, this place has become a forbidden place, and the second realm is not able to enter, and the Red Dragon Yuan has been blocked by the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, and no 607 allows any second realm to enter.

But Ye Tian is now in the third realm, and he is also cooperating with the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, so he can naturally enter.

Wow!

Ye Tian tore through the barrier of the Red Dragon Abyss and forcibly entered the Red Dragon Abyss.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying attack hit Ye Tian.

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, and with his strong strength, he directly shattered this attack.

"You are very good, I didn't expect that in such a short period of time, you will be promoted to the late stage of the third realm, and you have also practiced an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and the realm of super-dimensional rules has also been raised to a super-dimensional rule, I am afraid that it is not too far from comprehending the two super-dimensional rules!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon opened his blood-colored eyes and stared at Ye Tian, revealing a shocked look.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, long time no see!"

Ye Tian greeted.

"It's just a nap time, it's not a long time. "

Tricky Wood Red Dragon Road.

He admitted that he still underestimated Ye Tian, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to grow so fast.

At the same time, he was also looking forward to Ye Tian's breakthrough to the fourth realm, once Ye Tian broke through, he would be able to release him.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, I'm here to ask you some questions. Ye Tian sincerely asked.
